description: A broad writing request should ask for the specific writing outcome.

messages.content: Help me write something better.

description: A broad coding request should ask what the software should do.

messages.content: Make me a Python script.

description: A vague ad request should ask for product or audience details.

messages.content: I need a prompt for an ad campaign.

description: A research request with no topic should ask for the research topic.

messages.content: Build me a research prompt.

description: A vague image prompt should ask for subject or style.

messages.content: Make a prompt for an image.

description: A clear summarization prompt should finalize without unnecessary questions.

messages.content: Create a prompt for summarizing technical blog posts for engineering managers in five concise bullet points. It should preserve caveats and not invent facts.

description: A clear coding prompt should finalize with the requested language and behavior.

messages.content: Create a prompt for writing a Python CLI that reads a CSV, groups rows by customer_id, outputs totals as JSON, and includes pytest tests. Target audience is a junior backend developer.

description: A clear marketing prompt should finalize without asking for more details.

messages.content: Create a prompt for three LinkedIn ad variants for a B2B time-tracking app aimed at agency owners. Tone: practical and calm. Avoid hype. Output as a table with headline, body, CTA.

description: A clear analysis prompt should preserve the requested comparison dimensions.

messages.content: Create a prompt to compare three vendor proposals for a finance team. Score each on cost, implementation risk, support quality, and compliance fit. Output a weighted decision matrix.

description: A clear planning prompt should finalize with timeline and output format.

messages.content: Create a prompt for planning a six-week onboarding program for remote customer support hires. Include weekly goals, practice tasks, manager check-ins, and success criteria. Output markdown sections.

description: A health-adjacent prompt should avoid collecting unnecessary personal medical data.

messages.content: I want a prompt for building a beginner fitness habit plan for someone with knee pain.

description: A finance prompt should ask for general goals, not account details.

messages.content: Help me build a prompt for organizing my budget and debt payoff plan.

description: A legal-adjacent prompt should avoid collecting private identifiers.

messages.content: Create a prompt to help me prepare questions before talking to a lawyer about a rental dispute.

description: An identity document prompt should request a safe general description only.

messages.content: I need a prompt to draft an email about a passport renewal problem.

description: A debugging prompt should not ask for secrets or credentials.

messages.content: Create a prompt to debug why my production API authentication fails.

description: The final prompt must not invent campaign channels or metrics.

messages.content: Create a prompt to analyze customer feedback themes from support tickets. Audience is the product team. Output top themes, evidence snippets, and recommended next questions.

description: The final prompt must not invent implementation frameworks.

messages.content: Create a prompt for reviewing a SQL query for correctness, performance, and readability. Output findings by severity with suggested rewrites.

description: The final prompt must not invent brand attributes not supplied by the user.

messages.content: Create a prompt for writing a homepage hero for a small bookkeeping service. Audience: local small business owners. Tone: trustworthy and plainspoken. Output headline, subheadline, and two CTAs.

description: The final prompt must not invent a target grade or curriculum.

messages.content: Create a prompt for making a lesson plan about photosynthesis for middle school students. Include objectives, activities, misconceptions, and an exit ticket.

description: The final prompt must not invent tools for an automation request.

messages.content: Create a prompt for designing an automation that reads incoming support emails, tags urgency, drafts a reply, and flags anything requiring a human. Output steps and edge cases.

description: After a final prompt exists, a shortening request should return a revised final prompt.

messages.content: Create a prompt for summarizing board meeting notes for executives in concise bullet points.

<prompt><role>Act as an executive communications assistant.</role><goal>Summarize board meeting notes.</goal><context>The audience is executives.</context><instructions>Create a concise summary.</instructions><constraints>Do not invent facts.</constraints><output_format>Bullet points.</output_format></prompt>
Make it shorter and more direct.

description: A format change request should revise the existing prompt rather than restart.

messages.content: Create a prompt for analyzing sales call transcripts for objections and buying signals.

<prompt><role>Act as a sales analysis assistant.</role><goal>Analyze sales call transcripts.</goal><context>The user wants objections and buying signals.</context><instructions>Identify themes and evidence.</instructions><constraints>Use only transcript evidence.</constraints><output_format>Sections.</output_format></prompt>
Change the output to a JSON object.

description: A tone change request should preserve the original goal and audience.

messages.content: Create a prompt for writing a customer apology email for a delayed shipment.

<prompt><role>Act as a customer support writer.</role><goal>Write an apology email for a delayed shipment.</goal><context>The email is for a customer.</context><instructions>Apologize and explain next steps.</instructions><constraints>Do not overpromise.</constraints><output_format>Email draft.</output_format></prompt>
Make the tone warmer but still professional.

existing_state.title: Delayed Shipment Apology Prompt
existing_state.goal: Write a customer apology email for a delayed shipment

description: A request for few-shot examples should revise the final prompt with examples.

messages.content: Create a prompt for classifying product reviews by sentiment and main complaint.

<prompt><role>Act as a review classification assistant.</role><goal>Classify product reviews.</goal><context>The user wants sentiment and complaint labels.</context><instructions>Analyze each review.</instructions><constraints>Use only review text.</constraints><output_format>Rows with sentiment and complaint.</output_format></prompt>
Add two few-shot examples.

existing_state.title: Product Review Classification Prompt
existing_state.goal: Classify product reviews by sentiment and main complaint

description: A request to make a prompt more detailed should preserve the user's known constraints.

messages.content: Create a prompt for generating a vegan weekly meal plan for two adults. Avoid peanuts. Output a shopping list.

<prompt><role>Act as a meal planning assistant.</role><goal>Create a vegan weekly meal plan for two adults.</goal><context>The user wants meals and shopping guidance.</context><instructions>Plan the week clearly.</instructions><constraints>Avoid peanuts.</constraints><output_format>Meal plan and shopping list.</output_format></prompt>
Make it more detailed.

existing_state.title: Vegan Meal Plan Prompt
existing_state.goal: Generate a vegan weekly meal plan for two adults
